verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Many battles Many struggles But God has been there for me Fighting for me Winning for me He has never lost a fight

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The number of my scars Are the number of my victories That's why my praise Can never be the same as yours

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Excuse me If I get undignified You don't know Like I know what He has done For me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will sing I will shout I will dance I will let them know I will let them know
